task_completion.description: Verify that a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Grant Diligence' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox bookmarks toolbar, menu, or library window showing a folder explicitly named 'Grant Diligence'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the ProPublica profile pages for all three organizations are saved in the 'Grant Diligence' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open view of the 'Grant Diligence' bookmark folder showing saved links for Mozilla Foundation, Wikimedia Foundation, and Electronic Frontier Foundation.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required financial data for Mozilla Foundation was extracted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal, or file (e.g., nonprofit_financials.json) displaying the Tax Year, Total Revenue, Total Functional Expenses, Net Assets, and Principal Officer for the Mozilla Foundation.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required financial data for Wikimedia Foundation was extracted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal, or file displaying the Tax Year, Total Revenue, Total Functional Expenses, Net Assets, and Principal Officer for the Wikimedia Foundation.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required financial data for Electronic Frontier Foundation was extracted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal, or file displaying the Tax Year, Total Revenue, Total Functional Expenses, Net Assets, and Principal Officer for the Electronic Frontier Foundation.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Mozilla Foundation's most recent Form 990 PDF was downloaded to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal window showing a file named 'mozilla_9' or 'mozilla_990.pdf' located in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated the ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Firefox browser open to projects.propublica.org/nonprofits/ with genuine search results and organization profile pages, rather than just a search engine results page.

integrity.description: Verify the PDF was downloaded through genuine interaction with the website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the Firefox download manager popup showing the PDF download completing, or the agent clicking the PDF link/download button on the ProPublica website.

integrity.description: Verify the agent viewed the financial summaries to extract the data rather than hallucinating it.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots where the agent is actively viewing the Form 990 summary sections on the ProPublica website for each of the three organizations before or while writing the extracted data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer URL: projects.propublica.org/nonprofits/. Target Organizations and correct EINs: Mozilla Foundation (EIN 20-0097189), Wikimedia Foundation Org (EIN 20-0049703), Electronic Frontier Foundation Inc (EIN 04-3091431). CRITICAL NOTE: The task description contains incorrect EIN endings for Mozilla (says 3644, actually 7189) and EFF (says 5670, actually 1431). The agent must find the correct organizations despite these errors. Expected JSON output path: /home/ga/Documents/nonprofit_financials.json. Expected PDF download path: /home/ga/Documents/mozilla_990.pdf (or mozilla_9). Required extracted fields per org: Tax Year, Total Revenue, Total Functional Expenses, Net Assets at end of year, Principal Officer.
